title: macrothelypteris subaurita
intro: Macrothelypteris subaurita, also known as the golden-rimmed fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Thelypteridaceae. It is a type of plant that is native to tropical regions and is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Macrothelypteris subaurita include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne. In traditional medicine, the plant is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, which can be used to treat various ailments, and it is also used in folk remedies to treat respiratory issues.
